shieldIBHS Certified Program

FORTIFIED Home™ Certification

Strengthen your home against severe weather with FORTIFIED Home™ - a voluntary construction and re-roofing program developed by the Insurance Institute for Business & Home Safety (IBHS).

sendSchedule EvaluationemailContact Expert
55%
Insurance Savings

Why Choose FORTIFIED?

FORTIFIED Home™ provides measurable benefits that protect your investment and provide peace of mind

shield

Storm Protection

Enhanced resistance to high winds, hail, and severe weather events

savings

Insurance Discounts

Qualify for significant insurance premium reductions (up to 55%)

trending_up

Property Value

Increase home value and marketability with certification

verified

Third-Party Verification

Independent certification from qualified engineers

FORTIFIED Designation Levels

Choose the level of protection that's right for your home

roofing

FORTIFIED Roof™

Sealed roof deck with enhanced roof covering and attachment

  • check_circleSealed roof deck
  • check_circleRing-shank nails
  • check_circleStarter strip protection
  • check_circleDrip edge installation
home_repair_service

FORTIFIED Silver™

Roof designation plus protection for openings and attachments

  • check_circleAll Roof features
  • check_circleOpening protection
  • check_circleGarage door bracing
  • check_circleGable end bracing
workspace_premium

FORTIFIED Gold™

Complete home protection with foundation to roof envelope

  • check_circleAll Silver features
  • check_circleFoundation protection
  • check_circleComplete envelope
  • check_circleMaximum resilience
